sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: INTUITIVE SURGICAL INC의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출이 25억 1,000만 달러로 전년 동기 20억 4,000만 달러 대비 23% 증가했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 다빈치 시술량이 약 19%, Ion 시술량이 약 52% 증가했습니다.
3분기 시스템 매출은 5억 9,000만 달러로 전년 동기 4억 4,500만 달러에서 늘었습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 순이익에는 미국 세제 개편 등에 따른 주당 0.12달러의 세금 혜택이 반영됐습니다.

watchItems.text: 약 52%에 달한 Ion 시술량 고성장과 설치 기반 확대가 지속될지가 핵심입니다.
소모품·액세서리 매출 비중 상승에 따른 반복 매출 안정성에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: d quarter of 2024. • The Company grew its da Vinci surgical system installed base to 10,763 systems as of September 30, 2025, an increase of 13% compared with 9,539 as of September 30, 2024. The Company grew its Ion endoluminal system installed base to 954 systems as of September 30, 2025, an increase of 30% compared with 736 as of September 30, 2024. • Third quarter 2025 revenue of $2.51 billion increased 23% compared with $2.04 billion in the third quarter of 2024. • Third quarter 2025 GAAP net income attributable to Intuitive was $704 million, or $1.95 per diluted share, compared with $565 million, or $1.56 per d  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.51 billion = 25억 1,000만 달러; $2.04 billion = 20억 4,000만 달러; $704 million = 7억 400만 달러; $565 million = 5억 6,500만 달러; $867 million = 8억 6,700만 달러; $669 million = 6억 6,900만 달러; $2.51 = 2.51달러; $2.04 = 2.04달러; $1.95 = 1.95달러; $669 = 669달러; $867 = 867달러; $2.40 = 2.40달러; $1.84 = 1.84달러; 10,763 million = 107억 6,300만 달러; 9,539 million = 95억 3,900만 달러.

income attributable to Intuitive included tax benefits of $0.12 per diluted share associated with U.S. tax reform and the release of unrecognized tax benefits. • The Company repurchased 4.0 million shares of its common stock for $1.92 billion in the third quarter of 2025. Q3 Financial Summary Gross profit, income from operations, net income attributable to Intuitive Surgical, Inc., and net income per diluted share attributable to Intuitive Surgical, Inc. are reported on a GAAP and non-GAAP* basis. The non-GAAP* measures are described below and are reconciled to the corresponding GAAP measures at the end of this release. Third quarter 2025 revenue was $2.51 billion, an increase of 23% compared with $2.04 billion in the third quarter of 2024. The higher third quarter revenue was dri  Normalized numeric aliases: 4.0 million = 400만 달러; $1.92 billion = 19억 2,000만 달러; $2.51 billion = 25억 1,000만 달러; $2.04 billion = 20억 4,000만 달러; $0.12 = 0.12달러; $1.92 = 1.92달러; $2.51 = 2.51달러; $2.04 = 2.04달러.

f systems. Third quarter 2025 instruments and accessories revenue increased by 20% to $1.52 billion, compared with $1.26 billion in the third quarter of 2024. The increase in instruments and accessories revenue was primarily driven by approximately 19% growth in da Vinci procedure volume and approximately 52% growth in Ion procedure volume. Third quarter 2025 systems revenue was $590 million, compared with $445 million in the third quarter of 2024. The Company placed 427 da Vinci surgical systems, of which 240 were da Vinci 5 systems, in the third quarter of 2025, compared with 379 systems, of which 110 were da Vinci 5 systems, in the third quarter of 2024.
